name: persistent-notification-auth
title: Persistent notifications and identity guard
description: 通知中心当前内存 MVP 且 WebSocket 直接接受 user_id，需要持久化与身份边界加固。
creator: lijin
notes: Implemented persistent notification identity guard: SQLAlchemy store persistence verified across app recreation; REST cross-user mark-read/list covered; WebSocket now requires matching header/query/session identity and rejects path-only/mismatched claims with 1008; frontend notification copy no longer exposes MVP and hook sends matching query identity. Validation passed: tests/test_notifications.py, compileall, notification-center static test, frontend typecheck/test/build, git diff --check.
